title: Slack Emoji AI Search
name: slack-emoji-ai-search
description: Semantically search a local Slack emoji collection using AI and copy the name to your clipboard.
author: thz

commands.name: index
commands.title: Search Slack Emojis with AI
commands.description: Semantically search for Slack emojis using AI.

preferences.name: emojiDirectory
preferences.title: Emoji Directory
preferences.description: Path to local emoji directory containing emojis/emojis.json and emojis/aliases.json

preferences.name: aiProvider
preferences.title: AI Provider
preferences.description: Choose between GitHub Models (cloud) or a local LLM server (e.g. Ollama, LM Studio)

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
preferences.description: PAT with models:read scope for AI-powered search via GitHub Models (not needed for Local LLM)

preferences.name: ignoreList
preferences.title: Ignore List
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of emoji name prefixes to exclude from results (e.g. ofub, someprefix)

preferences.name: aiModel
preferences.title: AI Model (GitHub Models)
preferences.description: GitHub Models model to use for emoji candidate generation

preferences.name: localEndpoint
preferences.title: Local LLM Endpoint
preferences.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions URL for your local LLM (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions)

preferences.name: localModel
preferences.title: Local LLM Model
preferences.description: Model name to use with your local LLM server (e.g. llama3.2:3b, phi4-mini, qwen3:4b)
